_meta.note: Regression pins for the deterministic SIA harness in manuscript/03_results.md. Fixture replay copies genuinely executed threshold variants and reads results.json verbatim. All variants score 1.0 on the toy dataset, so the load-bearing claim is a flat robustness control—not fabricated self-improvement.

generation_count.reason: Number of completed SIA generations in the bundled fixture-replay run (Meta -> Target -> Feedback loop, max_generations=3 in manuscript/config.yaml). Backs SIA_GENERATION_COUNT and the row count of the fixture-replay metrics table. Re-derived as len(run_sia_loop(config)) from the real infrastructure loop, not copied from the manuscript.
generation_count.script: PYTHONPATH=<repo>:<template_sia> .venv/bin/python -c 'from infrastructure.sia import RunConfig, run_sia_loop; len(run_sia_loop(RunConfig(task_dir=.../tasks/mini_classify, output_dir=<tmp>, run_id=1, max_generations=3, live=False, fixtures_dir=.../src/fixtures/recorded_generations)))'

first_generation_accuracy.reason: Accuracy of the genuinely executed generation-1 threshold variant. Re-derived from artifacts[0].evaluation.metric_value; fixture gen_1/results.json records 1.0.

final_generation_accuracy.reason: Accuracy of the genuinely executed generation-3 threshold variant. Backs SIA_FINAL_METRIC_VALUE ('Final injected token: accuracy=1.0000') and records the saturated control honestly.

metric_delta_final_minus_first.reason: Measured delta = final accuracy - first accuracy = 1.0 - 1.0 = 0.0. This zero is a negative control against fabricating improvement on a saturated toy task.
metric_delta_final_minus_first.script: PYTHONPATH=<repo>:<template_sia> .venv/bin/python -c 'evals=[a.evaluation.metric_value for a in run_sia_loop(config)]; evals[-1]-evals[0]'

final_generation_n_samples.reason: Sample count backing the final evaluation. Backs SIA_FINAL_N_SAMPLES ('accuracy=1.0000 (n=6)') in 03_results.md and the fixture-replay metrics table.

generation_count.manuscript_section: manuscript/03_results.md / SIA generation metrics (fixture replay) table

first_generation_accuracy.manuscript_section: manuscript/03_results.md / SIA generation metrics (fixture replay) table
